title: Prefer constructor calls over list comprehensions for copying collections
description: Avoid using list comprehensions to copy collections. Instead, use the appropriate constructor calls, as comprehensions may have unintended side effects.
message: Prefer constructor calls over list comprehensions for copying collections.
recommendation: Use constructor calls for copying collections.

compliant.description: List constructor call to copy list 'b'

why_is_this_an_issue: List comprehensions may have unintended side effects, such as sorting or filtering the original collection.
how_to_fix: Replace the list comprehension with the appropriate constructor call for copying collections.
